source: sandbox live probing plus Alterios frontend enum extraction

table.validation: read populated view fields and get-data or get-data-simplified; UI preview requires title as one view-field mname

reference.validation: use as ref source=view and verify selector source data

grid.validation: get-data returns rows, headers, and settings

list.validation: get-data returns rows; frontend config component is empty

gantt.validation: readback preserves gantt settings and get-data returns rows

leaflet.validation: geoFields name uses populated view-field mname without field_ prefix; get-data returns rows

calendar.validation: UI edit page saves title/startDate/endDate/bgColor and preview renders month grid with events

gotchas: cards is not present in the confirmed frontend view.format enum
get-data-simplified returns rows only; full get-data returns headers and settings
when fieldNamePrefix is set, pass short field suffixes to create-field to avoid double prefixing
experimental table/reference/list UI preview can require settings.title; use a single populated view-field mname, not a Mustache template
content type fields do not appear in a view until added as view fields; ordinary fields use contentTypeFieldId, system _id uses attribute
ref source=view stores the related row id; create a joined table view to show readable related attributes such as employee FIO
person fields store structured objects, but table populatedValue can be null; verify person display in UI/form before using it as list/report text
leaflet final geoFields should be saved after view fields are attached and read back
leaflet marker rendering needs GeoJSON Feature values, not bare Point geometry
calendar UI preview requires settings.title in addition to startDate
